text: I feel a sense of solitude and quiet curiosity here. The dimly lit, empty hallway and glass-walled room evoke an atmosphere of anticipation—perhaps an event has ended, or one is yet to begin. Turning the corner to the wall with "R+D" and its invitation to research and innovate, I am reminded of the silent power of knowledge and the unending search for understanding. There is a hint of both unease and excitement in the air, as if these walls hold secrets waiting to be discovered.
